title: zantedeschia oculata
intro: Zantedeschia oculata, also known as the golden eye or golden lilyturf, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Colchicaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its antioxidant and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, Zantedeschia oculata is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
